rulings.Case Title: GRACE ANNE DOYLE et al VS. KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action And Appendix Of Non-California Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 15, 2010, line 5, DEFENDANTS KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC., THE PERMANENTE MADICAL GROUP, INC., Petition To Compel Arbitration and Stay Action. Is denied. All of the four cited enrollment forms do not comply with Health and Safety Code section 1363.1. Each of the arbitration clauses states that the arbitration applies to "other associated parties" and that term is not clear and understandable within the meaning of section 1363.1. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: HONG SANG MARKET, INC. VS. VIVIEN PENG et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 15, 2010, line 9, DEFENDANT VIVIEN PENG DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege facts regarding the rental agreement (paragraph 6) and the amount of rent due at the time the 3-day notice was served (paragraph 10.) Premises not properly described between body of complaint (1138 Grant Avenue), and attachment 15 (no description, or (1136-1138) Grant Avenue.) =(302/CWW)
